creator: zoliky@gmail.com
text: I want to point out that the current port, version 10.0.9, is not working and can't be built, which is why I sent in the update. This is my first time submitting, and I probably should've sent it to ports@freebsd.org instead of @bugs. Let's see how things go, and if my patches are okay, then I'll think about taking over some abandoned ports for maintenance.
